schema.description: Describes the response body of the /debug/{datasource}/status API call

bulkUploadHistory.description: Information about active and recent successful uploads for the datasource

items.description: Information about a successful bulk upload

uploadId.description: The unique ID of the upload

startTime.description: The start time of the upload in ISO 8601 format

endTime.description: The end time of the upload in ISO 8601 format, 'NA' if the upload is still active

status.description: The status of the upload, an enum of ACTIVE, SUCCESSFUL

processingState.description: The current state of the upload, an enum of UNAVAILABLE, UPLOAD STARTED, UPLOAD IN PROGRESS, UPLOAD COMPLETED, DELETION PAUSED, INDEXING COMPLETED

items.title: BulkUploadHistoryEvent

bulkUploadHistory.title: BulkUploadHistoryEventList

objectType.description: The object type of the document

count.description: The number of documents of the corresponding objectType

uploaded.description: A list of object types and corresponding upload counts. Note: This data may be cached and could be up to 3 hours stale.

indexed.description: The number of documents indexed, grouped by objectType

objectType.description: The object type of the document

count.description: The number of documents of the corresponding objectType

processingHistory.description: Information about processing history for the datasource

items.description: Processing history event for a datasource

startTime.description: The start time of the processing in ISO 8601 format

endTime.description: The end time of the processing in ISO 8601 format, 'NA' if still in progress

items.title: ProcessingHistoryEvent

processingHistory.title: ProcessingHistoryEventList

processingHistory.description: Information about processing history for the datasource
